title: Diyanet TV
summary:
Diyanet TV (English: Religious TV) is a Turkish television station owned and operated by Presidency of Religious Affairs of Turkey. It has a relationship with other local television stations and broadcasts some local news bulletins from 81 provinces of Turkey. The station evolved from TRT Anadolu that closed down in 2014 at 12:00 AM EEST and was rebranded as 
TRT Diyanet.
